# Vendored third-party

These files are checked into the repo so the project has zero npm/node
dependencies. They are unmodified copies of upstream releases.

- `three.module.js` — Three.js r166, MIT license.
  https://unpkg.com/three@0.166.1/build/three.module.js
- `OrbitControls.js` — Three.js examples/jsm/controls/OrbitControls.js
  from the same release, MIT license.
  https://unpkg.com/three@0.166.1/examples/jsm/controls/OrbitControls.js

To upgrade, re-fetch from the matching release URLs.
